rows.label: tev000911_MSG0010
rows.name:
At long last, a chance to settle
the score with the villain who
destroyed our beautiful Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000911_MSG0020
rows.name:
Nghhh...! I cannot contain my fury! I
say we strike now—he will burn in the
eight hot hells before the day is done![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000911_SEL0040
rows.name: Add Boze Rose to your team.

rows.label: tev000911_MSG0050
rows.name:
No time to waste, then. Move those
feet! The path to supreme
enlightenment won't carve itself![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000911_SEL0070
rows.name: Decline Boze Rose's request for now.

rows.label: tev000911_MSG0080
rows.name:
So you say it's not time? All
right. But you'd best believe I'm
staying right here until it is![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000911_MSG0090
rows.name:
Ha hah! And lo, the karmic fruit
ripens! The Buddha's guidance
has led us to this moment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000911_MSG0100
rows.name:
I had been contemplating challenging Void
myself, but I welcome anyone ready to cast
off their earthly desires with me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000911_MSG0110
rows.name:
Into the tiger's maw, my friends! We walk
the path of salvation—and so shall we
deliver, with our fists and with our fervor![ST:wait ]
